overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic action game showing a monkey warrior ascending snow-covered stone stairs at a mountain temple complex. The character moves from an enclosed cliff face with massive Buddha carvings through open mountain paths to a grand courtyard with traditional pagodas and snow-capped peaks.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside shrine with massive Buddha reliefs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up stone stairs beneath the carved cliff face, staff resting on shoulder

entered.detail: massive stone cliff face carved with multiple Buddha heads and religious reliefs
weathered stone staircase ascending the mountain
simple stone balustrade along the right side of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character stands before an immense cliff face carved with giant Buddha statues and intricate reliefs. The space is narrow and enclosed by rock overhead, with stone stairs leading upward along the cliff. The atmosphere is solemn and ancient, with detailed stone craftsmanship visible on the walls.

events.description: exits the covered cliff face into open mountain air with expansive views

agents.ego_description: continuing up the stairs as the carved cliff face ends and open mountain vistas appear on the right

entered.detail: uncarved natural stone wall continuing from the shrine
distant snow-capped mountain peaks visible through the opening

segments.scene_description: Leaving the sheltered cliff carvings, the path opens to reveal sweeping views of snow-covered mountains on the right. The stone stairs continue ascending alongside a raw stone wall, transitioning from the enclosed shrine to the exposed mountainside.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain path with ancient pine trees

events.description: enters open mountain path with large ancient pine trees and stone parapets

agents.ego_description: walking up the final section of stairs beneath snow-covered pines, approaching the summit

entered.detail: massive snow-dusted pine tree towering over the path
low stone wall with decorative posts replacing the cliff face
small stone tower structure visible on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path opens fully to the sky as the character ascends through a snowy landscape dominated by an ancient pine tree. A stone parapet lines the left side while a small stone stupa appears on the right. The air is crisp with snow covering the ground and branches.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple courtyard with pagoda and mountain backdrop

events.description: reaches the top of the stairs and enters the flat temple courtyard
slows pace while approaching the central pagoda to observe the surroundings

agents.ego_description: walking across the courtyard toward the multi-tiered pagoda, surveying the grand temple grounds and mountain views

entered.detail: flat stone-tiled courtyard surface replacing the stairs
red-walled traditional temple structure with tiled roof
tall wooden pagoda with multiple tiers standing against the mountains

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto a broad stone courtyard, the character approaches a magnificent multi-tiered pagoda set against a backdrop of towering snow-covered mountains. Traditional temple buildings line the left side while the open plaza provides a panoramic view of the winter landscape. The character slows to take in the serene and majestic atmosphere of the mountain temple summit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent from a sheltered, ancient cliffside shrine into a vast, open mountain temple summit. It begins in a narrow, solemn space enclosed by rock overhead, where the camera moves past immense Buddha statues and intricate reliefs carved directly into the cliff face. As the character climbs the stone stairs, the enclosed shrine gives way to an exposed mountainside, opening up to reveal sweeping views of snow-covered peaks to the right. The scene then expands fully under a crisp sky, passing an ancient pine tree and a small stone stupa before the path widens into a broad stone courtyard. Finally, the camera emerges into a majestic plaza featuring a multi-tiered pagoda and traditional temple buildings, set against a panoramic backdrop of towering winter mountains.
